name: Unarmored
note: No armor — AC is 10 + DEX modifier

name: Padded Armor
note: AC 11 + DEX modifier. Disadvantage on stealth.

name: Leather Armor
note: AC 11 + DEX modifier. No stealth penalty.

name: Studded Leather
note: AC 12 + DEX modifier. Reinforced with metal rivets.

name: Hide Armor
note: AC 12 + DEX modifier (max +2). Thick pelts and hides.

name: Chain Shirt
note: AC 13 + DEX modifier (max +2). Lighter than full chain.

name: Scale Mail
note: AC 14 + DEX modifier (max +2). Disadvantage on stealth.

name: Breastplate
note: AC 14 + DEX modifier (max +2). No stealth penalty.

name: Ring Mail
note: AC 14. Disadvantage on stealth. No DEX bonus.

name: Chain Mail
note: AC 16. Requires STR 13+. Disadvantage on stealth.

name: Splint Armor
note: AC 17. Requires STR 15+. Too expensive for starting gear.

name: Full Plate
note: AC 18. Requires STR 15+. The pinnacle of armor — must be earned.

name: Mage Robes
note: AC 11 + DEX modifier. Woven with faint protective runes.

name: Druidic Vestments
note: AC 12 + DEX modifier (max +2). Natural materials only — no metal.

name: Monk's Gi
note: AC 10 + DEX + WIS modifier. Monks add Wisdom to unarmored AC.
